title: To the Baikal
description: A small datapack that expands Patbox's Brewery mod with new drinks!
body:
# To the Baikal
TTB is a small datapack that expands [Patbox's Brewery](https://github.com/Patbox/brewery) Minecraft mod with new drinks!

It contains over 15 \*brews\*, including some secret ones!

To install, copy `ToTheBaikal.zip` into your `datapacks` directory, same as with any other pack. The pack obviously requires Patbox's Brewery itself to function.
